scripts.dev: node scripts/set-env.js dev && APP_ENV=dev expo start
scripts.dev:ios: node scripts/set-env.js dev && APP_ENV=dev expo start --ios
scripts.dev:android: node scripts/set-env.js dev && APP_ENV=dev expo start --android
scripts.staging: node scripts/set-env.js staging && APP_ENV=staging expo start
scripts.staging:ios: node scripts/set-env.js staging && APP_ENV=staging expo start --ios
scripts.staging:android: node scripts/set-env.js staging && APP_ENV=staging expo start --android
scripts.prod: node scripts/set-env.js prod && APP_ENV=prod expo start
scripts.prod:ios: node scripts/set-env.js prod && APP_ENV=prod expo start --ios
